description: This file defines the main page component for a student dashboard in a React application, fetching and rendering courses, assignments, grades, and announcements.

methods.name: formatDate
methods.description: Formats an ISO date string into a short, human-readable date.

methods.name: AssignmentRow
methods.description: React component rendering a row for an assignment, including title, due date, course code, and status badge.

methods.name: AnnouncementRow
methods.description: React component rendering a single announcement, including title, body snippet, author, and publish date.

methods.name: GradeRow
methods.description: React component rendering a grade summary with course code, title, percent, and progress bar.

methods.name: Home
methods.description: Main dashboard page component fetching data on mount and displaying courses, upcoming assignments, grades, and announcements.
